title: The Path to Sector Two
sector: Sector 1 — Guardian’s Refuge → Sector Two Gate
summary: After purifying the Corruption Heart, the Guardian leads the player to the Sector Two Gate. The path is filled with corruption remnants and unstable terrain. The player must clear corruption clusters, stabilize the Gate’s resonance, and confront a lingering corruption entity attempting to block the path. Once the Gate is stabilized, the Guardian opens the way to Sector Two.
steps: Meet the Guardian at the Refuge
Travel to the Sector Two Gate
objectives: Meet the Guardian at the Refuge
Travel to the Sector Two Gate
